name: @averatec0773/openclaw-fish-audio-live
author: averatec0773
description: Fish Audio low-latency speech provider for OpenClaw, using WebSocket TTS Live for real-time Discord voice channel conversation.

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts src/modes/speech-provider.ts src/modes/realtime-bridge.ts src/fish-audio/config.ts src/fish-audio/http-fallback.ts src/fish-audio/websocket-live.ts src/fish-audio/voice-list.ts src/fish-audio/types.ts --bundle=false --platform=node --format=esm --target=node22 --outdir=dist --out-extension:.js=.js
